childhood.familyBackground: Tse was born into a prominent Hong Kong family with interests in healthcare, pharmaceuticals, and medical devices. His family built wealth through medical innovation.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 쩌는 의료, 제약 및 의료 기기 관심을 가진 저명한 홍콩 가족에 태어났다.
childhood.education: University of Hong Kong; Stanford School of Medicine
childhood.earlyLife: Tse worked in healthcare and pharmaceuticals, building a successful medical device and pharmaceutical company. He became one of Asia's leading healthcare entrepreneurs.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 쩌는 의료 및 제약에서 일하며 성공적인 의료 기기 및 제약 회사를 구축했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded medical device and pharmaceutical company in Hong Kong
careerTimeline.eventKo: 홍콩에서 의료 기기 및 제약 회사 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded operations across Asia and into international markets
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아시아 전역 및 국제 시장으로 운영 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through healthcare portfolio success
careerTimeline.eventKo: 의료 포트폴리오 성공을 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Medical device regulatory approval delays affected product launches in key markets
failures.descriptionKo: 의료 기기 규제 승인 지연으로 주요 시장의 제품 출시에 영향
failures.lesson: Navigating regulatory approval processes requires patience and expertise
failures.lessonKo: 규제 승인 프로세스 탐색은 인내심과 전문성이 필요하다

quotes.text: Healthcare innovation transforms lives and reduces human suffering
quotes.textKo: 의료 혁신은 삶을 변환하고 인간의 고통을 줄인다

recommended.title: The Emperor of All Maladies
recommended.author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
recommended.note: Inspired his commitment to advancing cancer treatment and research
recommended.noteKo: 암 치료 및 연구 발전에 대한 약속을 영감을 줌

personalTraits.knownFor: Asian healthcare leadership; medical device innovation; pharmaceutical entrepreneurship
personalTraits.knownForKo: 아시아 의료 리더십; 의료 기기 혁신; 제약 기업가정신
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports medical research and healthcare access in Asia
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 아시아의 의료 연구 및 의료 접근성 지원
